heading: Sunday Night
text: Partly clear, passing clouds north before midnight. Lows in the low 50s, mid 50s around Lake Champlain, 40s in the mountain hollows. Northwest wind becoming light and variable overnight.

heading: Monday
text: Sunshine then clouds arriving from the west late. Less cool, Highs in the upper 70s, to low 80s. Gentle west winds around 5mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: Becoming mostly cloudy after midnight. A chance of passing showers late. Lows in the mid to upper 50s. Winds shifting southerly around 5mph.
